control.label: - Authorize Services
control.visible: Skin.HasSetting(Enable.MaintenanceTools) + !System.HasAddon(script.module.acctmgr) + [System.HasAddon(plugin.video.themoviedb.helper) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.fenlight) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.umbrella) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.pov) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.gears) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.redlight) | System.HasAddon(script.module.resolveurl) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.youtube)]

control.label: - Trakt
control.visible: Skin.HasSetting(Enable.MaintenanceTools) + !System.HasAddon(script.module.acctmgr) + [System.HasAddon(plugin.video.themoviedb.helper) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.fenlight) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.umbrella) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.pov) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.gears) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.redlight) | System.HasAddon(script.module.resolveurl) | System.HasAddon(plugin.video.youtube)] + !Skin.HasSetting(ToolsNoAuthorizeServices)

control.label: Set stacked widget load delay in milliseconds (1000ms = 1 second)
Show countdown timer for stacked widget load delay
Enable add-on browser top bar shortcut
Reset Backup Directory
control.onclick: Notification(FENtastic Plus,Backup directory reset to default,3000)

control.label: Number of search history items to display
- Trakt Lists (Authorize Trakt to use the feature)
Enable one-click trailers (long press play/pause button or 't' key on keyboard)
